'''lachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bifurcately|bifurcately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bifurcately|bifurcately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lachate|lachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lachatesher|lachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachatesherĂ«m|lachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lachatero|lachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lachateshĂ«|lachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachateshĂ«m|lachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilachatero|gokilachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilachateshĂ«|gokilachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachateshĂ«m|gokilachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golachankerom|golachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golachankeshĂ«|golachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golachankeshĂ«m|golachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golachankeya|golachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lachaterom|lachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachatemu|lachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lachateya|lachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilachaterom|gokilachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachatemu|gokilachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilachateya|gokilachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lachachate|lachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lachachatesher|lachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachachatesherĂ«m|lachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lachachatero|lachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lachachateshĂ«|lachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachachateshĂ«m|lachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilachachatero|gokilachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilachachateshĂ«|gokilachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachachateshĂ«m|gokilachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golachachankerom|golachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golachachankeshĂ«|golachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golachachankeshĂ«m|golachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golachachankeya|golachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lachachaterom|lachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachachatemu|lachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lachachateya|lachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilachachaterom|gokilachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachachatemu|gokilachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilachachateya|gokilachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠte|lĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠtesher|lĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠtero|lĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠtero|gokilĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠchĂŠnkerom|golĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠchĂŠnkeya|golĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠterom|lĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠtemu|lĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠchĂŠteya|lĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠterom|gokilĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠchĂŠteya|gokilĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafchafte|lafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafchaftesher|lafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafchaftesherĂ«m|lafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafchaftero|lafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafchafteshĂ«|lafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafchafteshĂ«m|lafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafchaftero|gokilafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafchafteshĂ«|gokilafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafchafteshĂ«m|gokilafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafchafnkerom|golafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafchafnkeshĂ«|golafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafchafnkeshĂ«m|golafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafchafnkeya|golafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafchafterom|lafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafchaftemu|lafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafchafteya|lafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafchafterom|gokilafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafchaftemu|gokilafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafchafteya|gokilafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
